ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Cmd/Ctrl+Enter to send, Enter for newline

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 使用 Obsidian 的附件设置

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 未安装？请在终端中运行：

ast.name: error
ast.source: forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported
ast.target: forceFrameRate 接受 0 到 125 之间的正整数，不支持强制设置高于 125 fps 的帧率

ast.name: error
ast.source: [Agent Console] New chat in directory error:
ast.target: [Agent Console] 在目录中新建聊天错误：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 解析 JSON 消息失败：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 消息处理期间发生意外错误：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 收到对未知请求的响应

ast.name: log
ast.target: [Lazy] 正在为代理获取新会话：

ast.name: log
ast.source: [Lazy] loadSession failed, falling through to new session:
ast.target: [Lazy] loadSession 失败，回退到新会话：

ast.name: log
ast.target: [ChatPanel] 正在通过 configOptions 应用配置的模型：

ast.name: log
ast.target: [ChatPanel] 清理：自动导出并关闭会话

ast.name: log
ast.target: [AcpClient] 正在使用配置开始初始化：

ast.name: log
ast.target: [AcpClient] Node.js 目录已添加到 PATH：

ast.name: log
ast.target: [AcpClient] 正在目录中启动代理进程：

ast.name: log
ast.target: [AcpClient] 正在开始 ACP 初始化...

ast.name: log
ast.source: [AcpClient] Agent returned end_turn with no session updates (may be expected for some commands)
ast.target: [AcpClient] 代理返回了 end_turn 但没有会话更新（对于某些命令可能是预期的）

ast.name: log
ast.target: [AcpClient] 正在发送 session/cancel 通知...

ast.name: log
ast.target: [AcpClient] 配置选项已设置。更新后的选项：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to Node.js. Usually leave blank. Only needed if node is in a non-standard location (enter absolute path, e.g. /usr/local/bin/node).
ast.target: Node.js 的路径。通常留空。仅当 node 位于非标准位置时才需要（输入绝对路径，例如 /usr/local/bin/node）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose the keyboard shortcut to send messages. Note: If using Cmd/Ctrl+Enter, you may need to remove any hotkeys assigned to Cmd/Ctrl+Enter (Settings → Hotkeys).
ast.target: 选择用于发送消息的键盘快捷键。注意：如果使用 Cmd/Ctrl+Enter，您可能需要移除分配给 Cmd/Ctrl+Enter 的任何快捷键（设置 → 快捷键）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically add the active note to a new chat's context strip. You can always pin notes manually with the grab button.
ast.target: 自动将活动笔记添加到新聊天的上下文条中。您始终可以使用抓取按钮手动固定笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which sidebar new chat views open in
ast.target: 新聊天视图在哪个侧边栏打开

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display emoji icons in tool calls, thoughts, plans, and terminal blocks.
ast.target: 在工具调用、思考、计划和终端块中显示表情符号图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Save open tabs when Obsidian quits and restore them on next launch. Each view restores its own tabs independently.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 退出时保存打开的标签页，并在下次启动时恢复它们。每个视图独立恢复自己的标签页。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically allow all permission requests from agents. ⚠️ Use with caution - this gives agents full access to your system.
ast.target: 自动允许来自代理的所有权限请求。⚠️ 谨慎使用 - 这将给予代理对您系统的完全访问权限。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show OS notifications when the agent completes a response or requests permission. Notifications are suppressed while Obsidian is focused.
ast.target: 当代理完成响应或请求权限时显示操作系统通知。当 Obsidian 处于焦点状态时，通知会被抑制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run agents inside Windows Subsystem for Linux. Recommended for agents like Codex that don't work well in native Windows environments.
ast.target: 在 Windows Subsystem for Linux 内运行代理。推荐用于像 Codex 这样在原生 Windows 环境中运行不佳的代理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify WSL distribution name (leave empty for default). Example: Ubuntu, Debian
ast.target: 指定 WSL 发行版名称（留空使用默认值）。示例：Ubuntu, Debian

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder where chat exports will be saved
ast.target: 聊天导出文件将保存到的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Template for exported filenames. Use {date} for date and {time} for time
ast.target: 导出文件名的模板。使用 {date} 表示日期，{time} 表示时间

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tag to add to exported notes. Supports nested tags (e.g., projects/agent-client). Leave empty to disable.
ast.target: 添加到导出笔记的标签。支持嵌套标签（例如，projects/agent-client）。留空以禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include images in exported markdown files
ast.target: 在导出的 Markdown 文件中包含图像

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder path for exported images (relative to vault root)
ast.target: 导出图像的文件夹路径（相对于保险库根目录）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically export the current chat when starting a new chat
ast.target: 开始新聊天时自动导出当前聊天

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically export the current chat when closing the chat view
ast.target: 关闭聊天视图时自动导出当前聊天

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically open the exported note after exporting
ast.target: 导出后自动打开导出的笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable debug logging to console. Useful for development and troubleshooting.
ast.target: 启用控制台调试日志记录。适用于开发和故障排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which agent is used when opening a new chat view.
ast.target: 选择打开新聊天视图时使用的代理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Gemini API key. Required if not logging in with a Google account. Select from Obsidian's Keychain or create a new secret.
ast.target: Gemini API 密钥。如果未使用 Google 帐户登录则必需。从 Obsidian 的钥匙串中选择或创建新密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Command name or path to the Gemini CLI. Use just "gemini" to let the login shell resolve it, or enter an absolute path for a specific version.
ast.target: Gemini CLI 的命令名称或路径。使用 \"gemini\" 让登录 shell 解析它，或输入特定版本的绝对路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter one argument per line. Leave empty to run without arguments.(Currently, the Gemini CLI requires the "--experimental-acp" option.)
ast.target: 每行输入一个参数。留空则不带参数运行。（目前，Gemini CLI 需要 \"--experimental-acp\" 选项。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter KEY=VALUE pairs, one per line. Required to authenticate with Vertex AI. GEMINI_API_KEY is derived from the field above.
ast.target: 每行输入一个 KEY=VALUE 对。使用 Vertex AI 进行身份验证时必需。GEMINI_API_KEY 从上面的字段派生。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Kiro CLI signs in with your Kiro account, so no API key is needed. Run "kiro-cli" once in a terminal to sign in, then select Kiro CLI here.
ast.target: Kiro CLI 使用您的 Kiro 帐户登录，因此不需要 API 密钥。在终端中运行一次 \"kiro-cli\" 进行登录，然后在此处选择 Kiro CLI。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Command name or path to kiro-cli. Use just "kiro-cli" to let the login shell resolve it, or enter an absolute path (commonly ~/.local/bin/kiro-cli).
ast.target: kiro-cli 的命令名称或路径。使用 \"kiro-cli\" 让登录 shell 解析它，或输入绝对路径（通常为 ~/.local/bin/kiro-cli）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter one argument per line. Kiro CLI requires the "acp" subcommand.
ast.target: 每行输入一个参数。Kiro CLI 需要 \"acp\" 子命令。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter KEY=VALUE pairs, one per line. Leave empty unless your setup requires it.
ast.target: 每行输入一个 KEY=VALUE 对。除非您的设置需要，否则留空。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Anthropic API key. Required if not logging in with an Anthropic account. Select from Obsidian's Keychain or create a new secret.
ast.target: Anthropic API 密钥。如果未使用 Anthropic 帐户登录则必需。从 Obsidian 的钥匙串中选择或创建新密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Command name or path to claude-agent-acp. Use just "claude-agent-acp" to let the login shell resolve it, or enter an absolute path.
ast.target: claude-agent-acp 的命令名称或路径。使用 \"claude-agent-acp\" 让登录 shell 解析它，或输入绝对路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter one argument per line. Leave empty to run without arguments.
ast.target: 每行输入一个参数。留空则不带参数运行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter KEY=VALUE pairs, one per line. ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is derived from the field above.
ast.target: 每行输入一个 KEY=VALUE 对。ANTHROPIC_API_KEY 从上面的字段派生。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: OpenAI API key. Required if not logging in with an OpenAI account. Select from Obsidian's Keychain or create a new secret.
ast.target: OpenAI API 密钥。如果未使用 OpenAI 帐户登录则必需。从 Obsidian 的钥匙串中选择或创建新密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Command name or path to codex-acp. Use just "codex-acp" to let the login shell resolve it, or enter an absolute path.
ast.target: codex-acp 的命令名称或路径。使用 \"codex-acp\" 让登录 shell 解析它，或输入绝对路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter KEY=VALUE pairs, one per line. OPENAI_API_KEY is derived from the field above.
ast.target: 每行输入一个 KEY=VALUE 对。OPENAI_API_KEY 从上面的字段派生。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Unique identifier used to reference this agent.
ast.target: 用于引用此代理的唯一标识符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Command name or path to the custom agent. Use just the command name to let the login shell resolve it, or enter an absolute path.
ast.target: 自定义代理的命令名称或路径。使用命令名称让登录 shell 解析它，或输入绝对路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter KEY=VALUE pairs, one per line. (Stored as plain text)
ast.target: 每行输入一个 KEY=VALUE 对。（以纯文本形式存储）

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 活动笔记作为默认上下文

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.target: 留空（登录 shell 自动解析）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Cannot handle permission response: missing onApprovePermission callback
ast.target: 无法处理权限响应：缺少 onApprovePermission 回调

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [AcpClient] Agent returned end_turn with no session updates — detected error in stderr
ast.target: [AcpClient] 代理返回 end_turn 但无会话更新 — 在 stderr 中检测到错误

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [代理控制台] 会话已恢复

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [代理控制台] 恢复会话失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [代理控制台] 会话已分叉

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [代理控制台] 分叉会话失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [代理控制台] 会话已删除

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [代理控制台] 删除会话失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [代理控制台] 标题已更新

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [代理控制台] 更新标题失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [代理控制台] 导出聊天失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [代理控制台] 已经是新会话

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: [Agent Console] Failed to create new session
ast.target: [代理控制台] 创建新会话失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [代理控制台] 没有可导出的消息

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [代理控制台] 代理已重启

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [代理控制台] 重启代理失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [代理控制台] 附加图片失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: [Agent Console] Could not determine file path
ast.target: [代理控制台] 无法确定文件路径

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: [Agent Console] This agent does not support image paste. Try drag & drop instead.
ast.target: [代理控制台] 此代理不支持图片粘贴。请尝试拖放。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [代理控制台] 没有活动的权限请求

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not restore previous tabs — saved state was corrupted.
ast.target: 无法恢复之前的标签页 — 保存的状态已损坏。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: [Agent Console] A tab with that name already exists
ast.target: [代理控制台] 已存在同名标签页

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [代理控制台] 没有打开的聊天标签页

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: [代理控制台] 没有可广播的提示

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: [Agent Console] No other chat tabs to broadcast to
ast.target: [代理控制台] 没有其他聊天标签页可广播

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: [Agent Console] No tabs ready to send
ast.target: [代理控制台] 没有准备就绪的标签页可发送

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Agent Console: the active note no longer follows the chat. Use the new context strip to pin notes into context.
ast.target: 代理控制台：活动笔记不再跟随聊天。请使用新的上下文条将笔记固定到上下文中。

ast.name: aria-label
ast.source: Don't add the active note as context for this chat
ast.target: 不将活动笔记作为此聊天的上下文

ast.name: message
ast.source: No active session. Please wait for connection.
ast.target: 无活动会话。请等待连接。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid value: Expected int32 to be >= -2147483648

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid value: Expected int32 to be <= 2147483647

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid value: Expected uint32 to be <= 4294967295

ast.name: name
ast.target: 切换上下文中的活动笔记

ast.name: notice
ast.source: [Agent Console] No active note to grab
ast.target: [代理控制台] 没有活动笔记可抓取

ast.name: text
ast.source: This only removes the session from this plugin. The session data will remain on the agent side.
ast.target: 这只会从此插件中移除会话。会话数据将保留在代理端。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Start a new chat session with the agent working in the specified directory.
ast.target: 在指定目录中启动一个与代理工作的新聊天会话。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The saved tab state could not be restored. The raw data is shown below for manual inspection.
ast.target: 无法恢复已保存的标签页状态。原始数据显示如下，供手动检查。
